last_comments: Made single-node the canonical non-production default runtime truth. GetConfig now defaults local/dev environments to runtime.profile=single-node, applies colocated web/worker/scheduler processes by default, and runtimeplan.Resolve infers single-node when the explicit local adapter/process topology matches the canonical SQLite/Otter/Backlite/inproc stack. Updated roadmap and known-gaps docs accordingly. Verified with go test ./config ./framework/runtimeplan.
